title: metastelma urbanianum
intro: Metastelma urbanianum, also known as Urban's Metastelma or Metastelma urbanianum, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to the island of Madagascar. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Metastelma urbanianum can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
